# Base Coat Repository History

This folder documents the evolution of the Base Coat repository through sprint stories, development learnings, and agentic workflow retrospectives.

## Stories

| Date | Story | Summary |
|------|-------|---------|
| 2026-04-30 | [Sprint: Hygiene & Security Hardening](2026-04-30-sprint-hygiene.md) | Resolved 11 issues in 90 min using fleet-mode parallel agents |
| 2026-05-01 | [The Story of Base Coat](2026-05-01-story-of-basecoat.md) | Full repo narrative: inception through v2.0.0+, 168 issues, 120+ PRs |

## Guides

| Guide | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| [Development Tips](development-tips.md) | How to run faster agentic sprints — prompt patterns, parallelism, and merge strategy |

## How to Add a Story

After a significant development session:

1. Create `docs/repo_history/YYYY-MM-DD-<short-name>.md`
2. Include: timeline, metrics, what went well, what could improve
3. Update this README table
4. Consider whether tips should be added to `development-tips.md`
